sentences.english: I usually wake up at seven o'clock.
First I brush my teeth and wash my face.
Then I eat breakfast — usually toast with eggs and a glass of milk.
sentences.korean: 그리고 아침을 먹어요 — 보통 달걀과 토스트 그리고 우유 한 잔이요.

sentences.english: I leave the house at eight thirty and take the bus to school.
sentences.korean: 8시 30분에 집을 나서서 버스를 타고 학교에 가요.

sentences.english: The bus ride takes about twenty minutes.

quiz.question: What does '버스 탑승' mean in English?
